section.heading: Limitation on accrual of increased pay or benefits

content.p: Unless otherwise provided by law, no person is entitled to increased pay or other benefits because of sections 12771 and 12772 of this title.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 103–337, div. A, title XVI, § 1662(k)(1), Oct. 5, 1994, 108 Stat. 3005.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 1374(d) of this title, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 103–337, § 1662(k)(2).

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Dec. 1, 1994, except as otherwise provided, see section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337, set out as a note under section 10001 of this title.
